ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the study */,
  "assumption" TEXT /* Assumptions made in the study (e.g., seasonality) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the study */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the intervention belongs to */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention (e.g., worst case) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the intervention */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the intervention was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the intervention */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the intervention was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the measure belongs to */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., new infections) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cases, people) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the measure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measure was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the measure */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "geographic_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic location (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the result belongs to */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention the result belongs to */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure the result belongs to */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the result belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the result */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the result */,
  "IQR_lwr" REAL /* Lower bound of the interquartile range */,
  "IQR_upr" REAL /* Upper bound of the interquartile range */,
  "CI95_lwr" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "CI95_upr" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
